result.status_detail: claude.ai default Chrome is logged out; /new redirects to /login?from=logout, no chat input available

notes: W4+W6 regression test NOT executed: precondition failed. CDP-driven default Chrome (port 9222) navigated to https://claude.ai/new but was hard-redirected to https://claude.ai/login?from=logout on every attempt (verified twice after hard reload + re-nav). Cookies present are anonymous only (anthropic-device-id, _fbp, ajs_anonymous_id, etc.) with no sessionKey/auth cookie -> session was explicitly logged out (from=logout). Cannot type PII prompt or submit without a logged-in session, and login requires interactive auth (no credentials). This is an environment/auth blocker, NOT a W4/W6 engine regression. Re-run after the test PC operator logs back into claude.ai in the default Chrome profile. engine_intercept_fired could not be observed because no request was ever sent.
